questions.question: После курса — какой capability вы могут confidently claim в interview, и что требует ещё production experience?

options.text: Confident: design streaming architectures, implement Flink jobs с state/watermarks/EOS, K8s deployment foundations. Need 6-12 months production: troubleshooting expertise (3 AM debugging), capacity planning + cost optimization, cross-team architecture decisions, specific scale claims (50k events/sec exactly-once)

questions.explanation: Honest self-assessment important для career growth + interview integrity. Confident claims: курс daught foundations + capstone built — verifiable via portfolio (architecture diagrams, code, design decisions discussed). Need production experience: troubleshooting depth from incidents, capacity reality from observation, cross-team decisions from interactions. Interview framing: 'Built capstone production-grade pipeline. Looking forward to applying в team production scale. Strong fundamentals, comfortable learning, hungry for incident response experience.' This is true и appropriate — overstating production credibility-risk.

questions.question: Continuous learning стратегии для staying current в streaming systems в 2026+?

options.text: (1) Subscribe Flink release notes; (2) Active в Apache Flink Slack; (3) Quarterly review what's new (Flink, Paimon, Iceberg, Kafka); (4) Practical experimentation с new features в side projects; (5) Network с другими Flink engineers (meetups, conferences); (6) Internal knowledge sharing (presentations, docs); (7) Follow VLDB papers; (8) Annual conference attendance (Flink Forward)

questions.explanation: Streaming evolves rapidly. 1.x → 2.x had massive changes. 2.x → 3.x будет тоже. Skills compound через continuous engagement: (1) Release notes catch breaking changes early; (2) Slack — first-line awareness of new features через community discussion; (3) Quarterly review — structured, doesn't depend on news showing; (4) Hands-on experimentation > reading — true learning; (5) Network — Flink engineers share war stories, patterns; (6) Teach — best way solidify knowledge; (7) Papers — depth; (8) Conferences — overview + networking. Career investment in niche streaming expertise long-term high upside.

questions.question: Path к open source contribution (Flink committer) — realistic timeline и steps?

options.text: Realistic 1-2 years sustained contribution: (1) Use Flink at scale (production experience); (2) Report bugs constructively (minimal reproductions, clear context); (3) Fix small bugs ('good first issue' tagged); (4) Add tests/documentation (accepted contributions, less risk); (5) Review others' PRs; (6) Propose features / write FLIP; (7) Speak at meetups/conferences. Multiple sustained signals required для committer recognition

questions.explanation: Apache committer recognition based на sustained valuable contributions. Not transactional (one PR = committer). Multiple signals over time: bug fixes, reviews, mailing list participation, FLIPs, talks. Path: (1) production experience → (2) bug reports → (3) small fixes → (4) tests/docs → (5) reviews → (6) feature proposals → (7) visibility. Each step builds reputation в community. Committer status = community trust earned. Career value: signals deep technical expertise, network effect, opportunity (talks, employment). Не easy or fast, но достижимо для committed engineers.

questions.question: Streaming systems expertise — niche skill с limited career value в 2026+.
questions.explanation: Opposite of true. Streaming + real-time data engineering — growing demand, limited supply expertise. 2026 market signals: senior+ Flink engineers commanding $200-350k+ US (comparable EU/UK senior), specialty roles в FAANG/large e-commerce/finance, increased corporate streaming adoption (real-time CDC, ML pipelines, agent runtime). Niche enough that few engineers have deep production experience — competitive advantage. Expertise compounds — 5+ years production Flink experience = senior+ level. Investment в depth here long-term career upside. Streaming + AI/ML intersection (ML_PREDICT, Flink Agents) further increases demand. Not 'just niche' — valuable specialty.
